response.justification: While Rodriguez demonstrates solid full-stack engineering capability and 16 years of experience, the profile falls well short of CTO-level requirements. Critical gaps include: zero proven executive leadership or team scaling (no evidence of managing 10-30+ person teams), only one year of claimed AI/agentic experience with unspecified production scope, complete absence of fintech or regulated-environment expertise, and no demonstrated background in multi-agent systems, LLM infrastructure, or ML feature engineering. The resume also contains an identity discrepancy (name 'Maria Rodriguez' with all contact info pointing to 'Bogdan Szabo') that raises authenticity concerns.
strengths: Versatile full-stack engineer with 16 years of experience across multiple languages and platforms
Documented exposure to distributed microservices at scale (Dunnhumby handling millions of requests/second)
Track record of building event-driven systems and open-source infrastructure (GISCollective)
concerns: AI/agentic experience limited to single recent role (1 year at re:cinq) with no demonstrated production multi-agent systems
No evidence of executive leadership, people management, or scaling engineering teams from 10 to 30+ people
Completely missing fintech infrastructure, credit systems, compliance/audit, or regulated-environment experience required for role
